contexts.context: ...I at last fought my way out and the <mark>search</mark> began for Yefrim YekEtkind whom I had invited as...
...and my imagination ran away with me. A protracted <mark>search</mark> produced no signs that he had been in Austria...
...and his fear communicated itself to me as I <mark>searched</mark> for Chester in Vienna.  It was nearly Christmas...
